description_long: This is a rectangular porcelain vase with a narrow, round neck and a flat base, featuring traditional blue and white underglaze decoration. Each side of the vase is adorned with hand-painted floral motifs, including various blossoms and leafy stems, rendered in different shades of cobalt blue. The neck of the vase is unglazed and shows a slightly rough, brownish ceramic texture, contrasting with the glossy, smooth body. The floral designs are framed by a subtle blue border, and the overall surface has a lustrous, reflective finish typical of glazed porcelain. The vase appears to be hollow and lightweight, suitable for holding flowers or as a decorative piece. Its style is reminiscent of classic Chinese export porcelain, often seen in urban interiors or displayed in public spaces.
description: A rectangular porcelain vase with blue floral motifs on a glossy white background and a narrow, round neck. The vase features hand-painted designs and a lustrous glazed finish.
description_view_0: This view shows a side with a prominent cluster of blue flowers and leafy stems, framed by a blue border, with the round neck clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side displays a different arrangement of blue blossoms, with more vertical floral elements and a slightly denser composition.
description_view_2: This view highlights a simpler floral motif with fewer blossoms and more open space, emphasizing the contrast between the blue and white glaze.
description_view_3: This side features a similar floral arrangement to view 1, with detailed blossoms and stems, but with subtle differences in the painted pattern.
